required_control: State that public observability is not model-specific training inclusion.

required_control: Report density-matched controls, NN-threshold sensitivity, CI checks, and train-label-shuffle null controls.
caveat: Controls are available, but they bound interpretation rather than proving causality.

caveat: Novelty-boundary table keeps the article framed as a protocol/reporting standard.

required_control: Treat ChEMBL release dates as public-observability anchors, not model pretraining dates.

required_control: Separate ChEMBL observability from whether models used ChEMBL.
caveat: Model registry and FM wrapper text keep model-specific ChEMBL use unknown unless documented.

required_control: Show that the work is more than data cleaning.
